//fabrik:cli:command rejects anything but an exported, non-variadic package factory
returning exactly *cli.Command (a lookalike *Command from another package does
not qualify).
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli v0.1.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli => CLIDIR
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {}
-- shared/shared.go --
package shared

import "github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"

type Commands struct{}

type Command struct{}

//fabrik:cli:command
func (c *Commands) Method() *cli.Command { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:command
func Generic[T any]() *cli.Command { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:command
func unexported() *cli.Command { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:command
func Variadic(names ...string) *cli.Command { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:command
func WrongReturn() error { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:command
func Lookalike() *Command { return nil }
-- want/diags --
error: shared/shared.go:9:1: //fabrik:cli:command must be a package function, not a method
  help: dependencies are parameters, not receiver fields
error: shared/shared.go:12:1: //fabrik:cli:command function Generic cannot be generic
  help: declare a concrete function
error: shared/shared.go:15:1: //fabrik:cli:command function unexported must be exported
  help: generated code calls it as a package-qualified symbol; capitalize the name
error: shared/shared.go:18:1: //fabrik:cli:command function Variadic cannot be variadic
  help: declare each dependency as its own parameter
error: shared/shared.go:21:1: command WrongReturn has the wrong signature
  help: want func(deps...) *cli.Command
error: shared/shared.go:24:1: command Lookalike has the wrong signature
  help: want func(deps...) *cli.Command
